patterns: auth-related routers: auth, auth_refresh, auth_session, auth_public (unprefixed by design — device/refresh flows)

versioned resources under /api/v1: items, projects, adrs, contracts, features, quality, workflows, impact, impact_scoring, dup_conflict, ingest, mine, traceability_score, coverage_matrix, mcp, graphs, agent, notifications, blockchain, execution
webhook sub-routers (github.webhook_router, webhooks.project_router) skip /api/v1 to keep POST URLs short and version-stable
WebSocket transport mounted separately as websocket.router
auth detection caveat: many routers apply Depends(current_user) at the APIRouter() level rather than per-decorator; static decorator scan is a lower bound
recommended_pattern: Standardize on /api/v1 for every router and lift auth into a single router-level dependency. Have every handler declare response_model=<SchemaOut> (or a discriminated Union) so OpenAPI is uniform. Mount the four auth* routers under /api/v1/auth/* and keep webhook + websocket routers as the only unversioned surfaces, documented as such in OpenAPI tag metadata.
